glosses.ja: そのような; そんな

sentences.target: C’est un tel bazar chez toi.

translations.fr: C’est un tel bazar chez toi.
translations.en: It’s such a mess at your place.
translations.es: Tu casa está hecha un desastre.
translations.de: Bei dir ist es ein einziges Chaos.
translations.it: A casa tua c'è un gran disordine.
translations.nl: Het is zo'n troep bij jou thuis.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा घर बहुत बिखरा हुआ है।
translations.el: Στο σπίτι σου υπάρχει μεγάλη ακαταστασία.
translations.nb: Det er så rotete hos deg.
translations.sv: Det är så stökigt hos dig.
translations.ro: E așa dezordine la tine acasă.
translations.cs: U tebe doma je takový nepořádek.
translations.da: Der er så rodet hos dig.
translations.ja: あなたの家はすごく散らかっている。

tokens.explanation: Clitic demonstrative subject pronoun elided before vowel, introducing the copula.
3rd person singular present of être used as copula linking the subject to the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun.
Determiner meaning ‘such’, masculine singular, pre-nominal intensifier modifying the noun.
Common noun functioning as predicate nominal complement of the copula.
Preposition indicating location, takes a disjunctive pronoun complement.
Disjunctive second person singular pronoun, complement of the preposition ‘chez’.

sentences.target: Je n’ai jamais vu une telle file ici.
sentences.reading: /ʒə n‿e ʒamɛ vy yn tɛl fil isi/

translations.fr: Je n’ai jamais vu une telle file ici.
translations.ipa: /ʒə n‿e ʒamɛ vy yn tɛl fil isi/
translations.en: I’ve never seen such a line here.
translations.es: Nunca he visto una fila así aquí.
translations.de: Ich habe hier noch nie so eine Schlange gesehen.
translations.it: Non ho mai visto una fila del genere qui.
translations.zh-Hans: 我从没在这里见过这么长的队伍。
translations.yue: 我喺呢度未見過咁長嘅人龍。
translations.ru: Я никогда не видел здесь такой очереди.
translations.pt: Nunca vi uma fila dessas aqui.
translations.he: בחיים לא ראיתי פה תור כזה.
translations.tr: Burada hiç böyle bir kuyruk görmedim.
translations.vi: Tôi chưa bao giờ thấy hàng dài như vậy ở đây.
translations.ar: لم أرَ طابورًا كهذا هنا من قبل.
translations.nl: Zo'n rij heb ik hier nog nooit gezien.
translations.uk: Я ніколи не бачив тут такої черги.
translations.hu: Még sosem láttam itt ekkora sort.
translations.hi: मैंने यहाँ इतनी लंबी लाइन कभी नहीं देखी।
translations.pl: Nigdy nie widziałem tutaj takiej kolejki.
translations.el: Δεν έχω ξαναδεί τέτοια ουρά εδώ.
translations.nb: Jeg har aldri sett en sånn kø her.
translations.id: Saya tidak pernah melihat antrean seperti ini di sini.
translations.sv: Jag har aldrig sett en sådan kö här.
translations.ro: Nu am mai văzut o astfel de coadă aici.
translations.cs: Nikdy jsem tu neviděl takovou frontu.
translations.da: Jeg har aldrig set sådan en kø hier.
translations.fi: En ole koskaan nähnyt tällaista jonoa täällä.
translations.ja: ここでこんな列を見たことがない。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Elided negative particle; first element of the negation with ‘jamais’.
1st person singular present auxiliary forming the passé composé with the past participle.
Negative adverb; with ‘ne’ forms ‘ne … jamais’ (‘never’).
Past participle of ‘voir’; main verb in the compound tense, takes a direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing the noun.
Determiner meaning ‘such’, feminine singular, modifies ‘file’.
Common noun meaning ‘queue/line’; direct object of ‘vu’.
Locative adverb indicating place.

sentences.target: On voit de telles choses parfois.

translations.fr: On voit de telles choses parfois.
translations.es: A veces se ven cosas así.
translations.it: A volte si vedono cose del genere.
translations.pt: Às vezes a gente vê coisas assim.
translations.vi: Đôi khi người ta thấy những chuyện như vậy.
translations.hi: कभी-कभी ऐसी चीजें दिख जाती हैं।
translations.id: Kadang-kadang kita melihat hal-hal seperti itu.
translations.da: Nogle gange ser man sådan noget.
translations.ja: ときどきそんなものを目にする。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/indefinite subject pronoun.
3rd person singular present of ‘voir’.
Preposition; here the plural article ‘des’ reduces to ‘de’ before a preposed modifier (‘telles’), yielding ‘de telles choses’.
Determiner, feminine plural, modifying ‘choses’ with the meaning ‘such’.
Common noun, plural; direct object of ‘voit’.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.

sentences.target: Il travaille à telle heure demain.

translations.fr: Il travaille à telle heure demain.
translations.en: He works at such an hour tomorrow.
translations.de: Er arbeitet morgen zu einer bestimmten Uhrzeit.
translations.it: Domani lavora a una certa ora.
translations.zh-Hans: 他明天在某个时间上班。
translations.yue: 佢聽日喺某個時間返工。
translations.ru: Он завтра работает в какое-то время.
translations.pt: Ele trabalha amanhã a uma certa hora.
translations.vi: Ngày mai anh ấy làm việc vào một giờ nào đó.
translations.ar: هو يعمل غدًا في ساعة ما.
translations.nl: Hij werkt morgen op een bepaald tijdstip.
translations.uk: Він завтра працює о певній годині.
translations.hi: वह कल किसी समय काम करेगा।
translations.pl: On jutro pracuje o jakiejś godzinie.
translations.nb: Han jobber i morgen på et visst tidspunkt.
translations.id: Dia bekerja besok pada suatu waktu.
translations.sv: Han jobbar i morgon vid en viss tid.
translations.ro: Mâine lucrează la o anumită oră.
translations.da: Han arbejder i morgen på et bestemt tidspunkt.
translations.fi: Hän tekee töitä huomenna tiettyyn aikaan.
translations.ja: 彼は明日ある時間に働く。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person masculine singular subject pronoun.
3rd person singular present of ‘travailler’; main verb.
Preposition marking time in the expression ‘à telle heure’.
Determiner, feminine singular, specifying the time (‘heure’).
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘à’ in a time expression.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.

I’ve never seen such a line here.
